zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Conteville於1035年4月30日出生在法國諾門迪艾孔特維爾時，她的父親Herluin de Conteville34歲，母親Herleva de Falaise31歲。她和Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1103年7月10日在法國諾門迪享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Conteville于1035年4月30日出生在法国諾門迪艾孔特維爾时，她的父亲Herluin de Conteville34岁，母亲Herleva de Falaise31岁。她和Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1103年7月10日在法国諾門迪享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Conteville was born on 30 April 1035, in Conteville, Eure, Normandy, France, her father, Herluin de Conteville, was 34 and her mother, Herleva de Falaise, was 31. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. She died on 10 July 1103, in Normandy, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Conteville est née le 30 avril 1035, à Conteville, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Herluin de Conteville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Herleva de Falaise, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Elle est décédée le 10 juillet 1103, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Conteville am 30. April 1035 in Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herluin de Conteville 34 und ihre Mutter Herleva de Falaise 31. Sie hatte mit Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Juli 1103 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Conteville è nata il il 30 aprile 1035 nel Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Herluin de Conteville, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Herleva de Falaise, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Morì il 10 luglio 1103, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Contevilleが1035年4月30日にフランスノーマンディエウアコンテヴィルで生まれた時，父Herluin de Contevilleは34歳，母Herleva de Falaiseは31歳であった。彼女はRichard le Goz Viscount of Avranchesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1103年7月10日にフランスノーマンディで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Conteville(이)가 1035년 4월 30일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콘테빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herluin de Conteville(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Herleva de Falaise(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1103년 7월 10일 프랑스 노먼디에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Conteville nasceu em 30 de abril de 1035, em Conteville, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Herluin de Conteville, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Herleva de Falaise, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Ela faleceu em 10 de julho de 1103, em Normandie, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Conteville родилась 30 апреля 1035 г. в местности контевилл, эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Herluin de Conteville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Herleva de Falaise, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Она умерла 10 июля 1103 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.
